title: Savory Fregola Pilaf with Canadian Twist
description: A flavorful pilaf dish from the Canadian coast, featuring intense savory fregola pasta and a blend of aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Mixed vegetables (e.g. bell peppers, carrots, zucchini)

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add mixed vegetables and cook until tender, about 5-6 minutes.
Add fregola pasta, chicken broth, thyme, and salt. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes or until the liquid has been absorbed and the fregola is tender.
Stir in grated Canadian cheddar cheese until melted and well combined.
Season with additional salt if needed.
Transfer to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
